allow: Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' ORDER BY name;")

Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="INSERT INTO data_access_audit \(id, company_id, user_id, action, resource_type, resource_id, details, initiated_by\) VALUES \(''test-1'', ''company-demo'', ''user-42'', ''READ'', ''USER_PII'', ''res-123'', ''{""path"":""/api/user""}'', ''user''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="SELECT * FROM data_access_audit;")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="DELETE FROM data_access_audit WHERE id=''test-1'';")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="PRAGMA table_info\(data_access_audit\);")

Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="INSERT INTO data_access_audit \(id, company_id, user_id, action, resource_type, resource_id, details, initiated_by, created_at, integrity_hash, prev_hash\) VALUES \(''test-hash-1'', ''c1'', NULL, ''READ'', ''USER_PII'', NULL, NULL, ''system'', ''2026-03-02T22:50:00Z'', ''abc123hash'', ''GENESIS''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="SELECT id, integrity_hash, prev_hash FROM data_access_audit WHERE id = ''test-hash-1'';")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute agentic-ally-memory --local --command="DELETE FROM data_access_audit WHERE id = ''test-hash-1'';")
